meta.title: Apply Now | Pro-Tech Staffing
meta.description: Submit your application to Pro-Tech Staffing and join our talent pool. Our recruiters will match you with manufacturing, warehouse, and industrial opportunities.

hero.heading: Apply Now
hero.description: Don't see a specific job? Submit your application and our team will match you with the right opportunity. We're always looking for reliable workers across manufacturing, warehouse, and industrial roles.

step1.title: We review your application
step1.desc: A recruiter at your nearest office reviews your experience, skills, and availability — usually within 24 hours.

step2.title: We reach out to you
step2.desc: If there's a match, we'll call or text you to discuss available positions and schedule an in-person or phone interview.

step3.title: You start working
step3.desc: Once placed, you'll receive onboarding details, your start date, and everything you need to hit the ground running.

cta.heading: Want to browse specific positions?
cta.description: Check our job board to see what's currently available in your area.
